name: verify_identity
description: Verifies a customer's identity using their date of birth or SSN last four digits.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer to validate.
user_id.title: User Id

verification_type.description: Credential to compare for verification ('dob' or 'ssn_last4').
verification_type.title: Verification Type

verification_value.description: Customer supplied value that must match the stored credential.
verification_value.title: Verification Value

name: activate_account
description: Reactivates a customer's inactive account when it has not been permanently closed.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the account owner.
user_id.title: User Id

account_id.description: Identifier of the account that should be reactivated.
account_id.title: Account Id

name: deactivate_account
description: Deactivates a customer's account to mitigate risk or honor a deactivation request.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the account owner.
user_id.title: User Id

account_id.description: Identifier of the account that should be deactivated.
account_id.title: Account Id

reason.description: Explanation supplied to the customer for the deactivation.
reason.title: Reason

name: open_account
description: Opens a new banking account for an existing customer with an optional initial deposit.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer opening the account.
user_id.title: User Id

account_type.description: Type of account to create (checking, savings, cd, or credit_card).
account_type.title: Account Type

initial_deposit.description: Amount of funds to seed the account with, if any.
initial_deposit.title: Initial Deposit

name: check_account_status
description: Retrieves current status details for the specified account across all customers.

account_id.description: Identifier of the account to inspect.
account_id.title: Account Id

name: freeze_account
description: Freezes a customer's account to prevent activity while a risk or fraud concern is investigated.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the account owner.
user_id.title: User Id

account_id.description: Identifier of the account that should be frozen.
account_id.title: Account Id

reason.description: Explanation recorded for freezing the account.
reason.title: Reason

name: track_chargeback_status
description: Retrieves current chargeback details for a specific dispute across all customers.

dispute_id.description: Identifier of the dispute whose status should be reviewed.
dispute_id.title: Dispute Id

name: resend_otp
description: Resends a one-time passcode to the customer through the requested delivery channel.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer receiving the OTP.
user_id.title: User Id

channel.description: Delivery method to use for the OTP ('sms', 'email', or 'push').
channel.title: Channel

name: register_device
description: Registers a customer's device so future access can be trusted and tracked.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer registering the device.
user_id.title: User Id

device_id.description: Unique identifier presented by the device being registered.
device_id.title: Device Id

name: process_account_application
description: Processes customer requests to open a new account or close an existing one.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the requesting customer.
user_id.title: User Id

account_type.description: Type of account to open or close.
account_type.title: Account Type

initial_deposit.description: Funds to seed a new account when opening.
initial_deposit.title: Initial Deposit

account_id.description: Identifier of the account to close when applicable.
account_id.title: Account Id

name: update_account_info
description: Updates a customer's profile details across all accounts, including address, email, or contact info.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer to update.
user_id.title: User Id

update_type.description: Category of information to change ('address', 'email', or 'contact').
update_type.title: Update Type

address1.description: Primary street address when updating address information.
address1.title: Address1

city.description: City associated with the customer's address update.
city.title: City

state.description: State or province for the address update.
state.title: State

zip_code.description: Postal code for the address update.
zip_code.title: Zip Code

country.description: Country for the updated address, defaulting to USA when omitted.
country.title: Country

email.description: New email address when updating email or contact information.
email.title: Email

phone.description: New phone number when updating contact information.
phone.title: Phone

name: update_name
description: Updates a customer's legal name after verifying that required documentation is provided.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer whose name will change.
user_id.title: User Id

new_first_name.description: Replacement first name to record across accounts.
new_first_name.title: New First Name

new_last_name.description: Replacement last name to record across accounts.
new_last_name.title: New Last Name

documentation_provided.description: Indicates whether the customer supplied proof of the name change.
documentation_provided.title: Documentation Provided

name: transfer_funds
description: Executes an intra-bank transfer or a withdrawal for a customer after validating inputs.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer initiating the transaction.
user_id.title: User Id

transaction_type.description: Type of movement to perform ('transfer' or 'withdraw').
transaction_type.title: Transaction Type

account_id.description: Account to withdraw from when performing withdrawals.
account_id.title: Account Id

amount.description: Dollar amount to move or withdraw.
amount.title: Amount

withdrawal_method.description: Channel used for withdrawals (for example, ATM or teller code).
withdrawal_method.title: Withdrawal Method

branch_id.description: Branch identifier when scheduling an in-person withdrawal pickup.
branch_id.title: Branch Id

name: create_money_transfer_with_explicit_kind
description: Creates an outbound money transfer and performs compliance screening before submission.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer initiating the transfer.
user_id.title: User Id

from_account_id.description: Source account that will fund the transfer.
from_account_id.title: From Account Id

to_account.description: Destination account identifier or routing details.
to_account.title: To Account

amount.description: Dollar amount to move to the destination account.
amount.title: Amount

kind.description: Transfer mechanism such as ACH, wire, or internal transfer.
kind.title: Kind

name: validate_transfer_details
description: Validates destination account and routing information before a transfer is initiated.

to_account.description: Destination account number or alias to verify.
to_account.title: To Account

ifsc_swift.description: Optional routing code such as IFSC or SWIFT to validate.
ifsc_swift.title: Ifsc Swift

name: cancel_transfer
description: Cancels a customer's transfer when it has not yet completed or failed irreversibly.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer requesting cancellation.
user_id.title: User Id

transfer_id.description: Identifier of the transfer to cancel.
transfer_id.title: Transfer Id

name: check_transfer_status
description: Retrieves the status details for a specific transfer across all customers.

transfer_id.description: Identifier of the transfer to look up.
transfer_id.title: Transfer Id

name: run_compliance_check
description: Performs a simplified compliance evaluation for a transfer or related transaction context.

context_id.description: Identifier used to seed the compliance decision.
context_id.title: Context Id

name: create_loan_application
description: Submits a new loan application and records it with compliance metadata.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the applicant.
user_id.title: User Id

loan_type.description: Product type requested by the customer.
loan_type.title: Loan Type

amount.description: Principal amount the customer wants to borrow.
amount.title: Amount

channel.description: Channel through which the application is submitted.
channel.title: Channel

name: loan_eligibility_check
description: Estimates a customer's eligibility for a loan by evaluating credit score and account history.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer to evaluate.
user_id.title: User Id

amount.description: Desired loan amount for the eligibility assessment.
amount.title: Amount

name: get_credit_score
description: Retrieves the customer's stored credit score along with category context.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer whose credit score is requested.
user_id.title: User Id

name: validate_kyc
description: Evaluates the completeness of a customer's KYC profile and highlights missing fields.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer being reviewed.
user_id.title: User Id

name: calculate_dti
description: Calculates the customer's estimated debt-to-income ratio using known loans and credit balances.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer whose finances are evaluated.
user_id.title: User Id

name: request_missing_docs
description: Sends a document request to the customer when additional paperwork is required.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer who must supply documents.
user_id.title: User Id

doc_list.description: Comma-separated list of documents the customer needs to provide.
doc_list.title: Doc List

name: block_card
description: Blocks a customer's card to stop transactions after loss, theft, or suspicious use.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the cardholder.
user_id.title: User Id

card_id.description: Identifier of the card to block.
card_id.title: Card Id

reason.description: Reason provided for the block request.
reason.title: Reason

name: mail_card
description: Orders a new or replacement card to be mailed to the customer's verified address.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the recipient customer.
user_id.title: User Id

card_type.description: Type of card to issue ('credit_card' or 'debit_card').
card_type.title: Card Type

card_brand.description: Network brand to imprint on the card.
card_brand.title: Card Brand

expedited.description: When True forces expedited shipping, otherwise standard shipping is used.
expedited.title: Expedited

replacement_for.description: Existing card identifier when replacing a specific card.
replacement_for.title: Replacement For

reason.description: Explanation for the replacement; required when replacement_for is provided.
reason.title: Reason

name: apply_for_loan
description: Submits a loan request for underwriting while validating core eligibility criteria.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the applicant.
user_id.title: User Id

amount.description: Principal amount requested by the customer.
amount.title: Amount

interest_rate.description: Proposed interest rate for the product.
interest_rate.title: Interest Rate

repayment_account.description: Optional account to use for repayments if approved.
repayment_account.title: Repayment Account

name: add_dispute
description: Files a dispute for a suspicious or incorrect transaction tied to an account or card.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer raising the dispute.
user_id.title: User Id

account_id.description: Account or payment method associated with the disputed transaction.
account_id.title: Account Id

amount.description: Dollar amount believed to be incorrect.
amount.title: Amount

transaction_date.description: Date of the disputed transaction if known.
transaction_date.title: Transaction Date

name: update_credit_limit
description: Reviews and processes a credit limit change request for a credit card account.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the cardholder.
user_id.title: User Id

account_id.description: Credit account whose limit should change.
account_id.title: Account Id

new_limit.description: Desired credit limit after the adjustment.
new_limit.title: New Limit

reason.description: Context for the change, such as customer request or risk review.
reason.title: Reason

name: check_card_status
description: Returns the operational status and metadata for a customer's card.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the cardholder.
user_id.title: User Id

card_id.description: Identifier of the card to inspect.
card_id.title: Card Id

name: unblock_card
description: Re-enables a card that was previously blocked once it is safe to use again.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the cardholder.
user_id.title: User Id

card_id.description: Identifier of the card to reactivate.
card_id.title: Card Id

name: renew_card
description: Initiates renewal for a card that is approaching its expiration date.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the cardholder.
user_id.title: User Id

card_id.description: Identifier of the card to renew.
card_id.title: Card Id

name: check_card_shipment
description: Provides mock shipment tracking information for a recently issued card.

card_id.description: Identifier of the card whose shipment is being tracked.
card_id.title: Card Id

name: get_card_upgrade_options
description: Lists available upgrade tiers and benefits for a customer's card.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the cardholder.
user_id.title: User Id

card_id.description: Identifier of the card to evaluate for upgrades.
card_id.title: Card Id

name: upgrade_card
description: Kicks off an upgrade request that moves the card to a higher rewards tier.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the cardholder.
user_id.title: User Id

card_id.description: Identifier of the card to upgrade.
card_id.title: Card Id

new_tier.description: Target tier for the upgraded card.
new_tier.title: New Tier

name: withdraw_cash_on_atm_or_mobile_app
description: Processes a cash withdrawal through ATM, branch, or mobile app channels with limit checks.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer.
user_id.title: User Id

account_id.description: Account to debit for the withdrawal.
account_id.title: Account Id

channel.description: Channel used for the withdrawal ('atm', 'branch', or 'mobile_app').
channel.title: Channel

name: verify_pin
description: Confirms whether the provided PIN matches the customer's stored ATM credential.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer to verify.
user_id.title: User Id

pin.description: Four-digit PIN supplied by the customer.
pin.title: Pin

name: check_atm_status
description: Returns mock operational status information for a specified ATM.

atm_id.description: Identifier of the ATM to query.
atm_id.title: Atm Id

name: get_user_details
description: Returns the full customer profile including accounts, loans, and payment instruments.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer to retrieve.
user_id.title: User Id

name: get_product_info
description: Provides descriptive information and rates for the specified banking product category.

product_type.description: Product category to summarize (checking, savings, cd, credit_card, or loan).
product_type.title: Product Type

specific_product.description: Optional sub-product identifier for finer detail.
specific_product.title: Specific Product

name: generate_documents
description: Generates official banking documents such as statements or confirmations for a customer.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer requesting the document.
user_id.title: User Id

document_type.description: Document category to produce (statement, confirmation, disclosure, tax_document).
document_type.title: Document Type

account_id.description: Optional account identifier to scope the document.
account_id.title: Account Id

date_range.description: Optional date range to include in the document.
date_range.title: Date Range

name: send_certificate
description: Issues an official banking certificate and delivers it through the requested channel.

user_id.description: Banking database identifier of the customer requesting the certificate.
user_id.title: User Id

certificate_type.description: Type of certificate to generate (account_opening, loan_payoff, balance_confirmation).
certificate_type.title: Certificate Type

account_id.description: Optional account or loan identifier referenced by the certificate.
account_id.title: Account Id

delivery_method.description: Delivery channel for the certificate ('email', 'mail', or 'branch_pickup').
delivery_method.title: Delivery Method

name: calculate
description: Evaluates a safe mathematical expression to assist with quick financial calculations.

expression.description: Arithmetic expression containing digits and basic operators.
expression.title: Expression

calculation_type.description: Label describing the calculation context presented to the user.
calculation_type.title: Calculation Type

name: think
description: Captures intermediate reasoning steps that the agent wants to note without acting.

thought.description: Narrative describing the agent's internal reasoning.
thought.title: Thought

name: transfer_to_human_agents
description: Escalates the conversation to a human banker when the request requires manual handling.

reason.description: Explanation to share with the human agent about the escalation.
reason.title: Reason

priority.description: Urgency level for the escalation queue ('low', 'medium', 'high', or 'urgent').
priority.title: Priority

context.description: Additional context or transcript snippet helpful to the human banker.
context.title: Context
